prompt:
An entry-level FDM 3D printer on a clean workbench with the gantry squared and the X- and Y-axis belts visibly aligned and evenly tensioned. A small tension gauge tool and hex keys rest nearby, and the belt path and idlers are clearly visible to communicate “belt tensioned and gantry re-squared” as a completed maintenance state.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image in a grounded near-future solarpunk maker lab: soft cinematic lighting, realistic metal and plastic textures, no brand logos, no readable labels, and no on-image text. Keep the printer centered and uncluttered so it reads clearly as an inventory icon.
